name: Winged Dragon, Guardian of the Fortress #2

name: Jigen Bakudan

name: Peacock
desc: A large peacock that launches its feathers in a lethal attack.

name: Snake Fang
desc: Decrease 1 selected monster's DEF by 500 points during the turn this card is activated.

name: Final Destiny

name: Labyrinth Wall

name: The Forceful Sentry
desc: Look at your opponent's hand. Select 1 card among them and return it to his/her Deck. The Deck is then shuffled.

name: Mechanical Snail

name: Wall Shadow

name: Umiiruka

desc: All FIRE monsters gain 500 ATK and lose 400 DEF.

name: Boar Soldier

name: Whiptail Crow

These positions cannot be changed during the turn this card is activated except by the effect of a Spell, Trap or Effect Monster Card. You can only activate this card during your Standby Phase.

desc: Equip only to "Labyrinth Wall". You can Tribute the equipped monster; Special Summon "Wall Shadow" from your Deck.

(This card is always treated as a "Toon" card.)
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 2 monsters, while you control "Toon World". Cannot attack the turn it is Special Summoned. You must pay 500 LP to declare an attack with this monster. If "Toon World" on the field is destroyed, destroy this card. Can attack your opponent directly, unless they control a Toon monster, in which case this card must target a Toon monster for its attacks.

If they are Summoned or flipped face-up at the same time, they are all destroyed.)

desc: Decrease 1 selected monster's DEF by 500 points during the turn this card is activated.

desc: Both players must keep their hands revealed.

desc: This creature adopts the form of a white goat living in the forest, but is actually a Forest Elder.

desc: All LIGHT monsters gain 500 ATK and lose 400 DEF.

desc: Increase 1 face-up monster's DEF by 700 points until the end of this turn.

desc:
At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card destroyed a monster(s) by battle and sent it to the Graveyard this Battle Phase: Equip all those monsters from the Graveyard to this card as an Equip Spell Card(s) with this effect.
● The equipped monster gains 200 ATK.

Then, each player excavates cards from the top of their Deck, until they excavate the same number of monsters they shuffled into their Main Deck. Special Summon all excavated Level 4 or lower monsters in face-down Defense Position, also send the remaining cards to the Graveyard.

desc: If your opponent controls at least 2 more monsters than you do, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand).

desc: When this card is activated: If there are any Field Spell Cards on the field, destroy them. During each player's Standby Phase: The turn player takes 500 damage.

Both you and your opponent then Special Summon from your hand the same number of Monster Cards on the field in face-down Defense Position.

name: Deepsea Warrior

name: Monster Recovery

(You cannot activate this card if you have a card in your hand that is owned by your opponent.)

name: Spirit of the Harp

desc: Change all face-up Dragon-Type monsters on the field to Defense Position, also they cannot change their battle positions.

desc: "M-Warrior #1" + "M-Warrior #2"

desc: You can Tribute 2 monsters; inflict 1200 damage to your opponent.

name: Summoner of Illusions
desc: FLIP: Tribute 1 other monster, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, but destroy it during the End Phase of this turn.

name: Spirit Message "I"
desc: This card can only be placed on the field by the effect of "Destiny Board".

name: Vengeful Bog Spirit
desc: Monsters cannot attack the turn they are Summoned.

name: Zombyra the Dark
desc: This card cannot attack your opponent directly. If this card destroys a monster by battle: This card loses 200 ATK.

name: Fairy Box
desc: When your opponent's monster declares an attack: Toss a coin and call it. If you call it right, the attacking monster's ATK becomes 0 until the end of the Battle Phase. During each of your Standby Phases, pay 500 Life Points or destroy this card.

name: Grand Tiki Elder
desc: A masked monster that wields the most deadly of curses.

name: Cyclon Laser
desc: You can only equip this card to "Gradius". Increase the ATK of "Gradius" by 300 points. When the equipped "Gradius" attacks with an ATK that is higher than the DEF of a Defense Position monster, inflict the difference as Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points.

name: The Dark Door
desc: Only 1 monster can attack during each Battle Phase.

name: Aqua Spirit
desc: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card can only be Special Summoned by removing from play 1 WATER monster in your Graveyard. During each of your opponent's Standby Phases, you can change the battle position of 1 of your opponent's face-up Monster Cards. Once changed, the monster must remain in this position for the rest of the turn.

name: Jowgen the Spiritualist
desc: You can discard 1 random card from your hand to the Graveyard; destroy all Special Summoned monsters on the field. Neither player can Special Summon monsters.

name: Collected Power
desc: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; equip it with all Equip Cards on the field. If any of those Equip Cards is now equipped to an incorrect target, destroy that Equip Card.

name: Supply
desc: FLIP: Return 2 Fusion-Material monsters that were sent to the Graveyard as a result of a Fusion Summon to your hand.

name: Tornado Wall
desc: Activate only while "Umi" is on the field. While "Umi" is face-up on the field, you take no Battle Damage from attacking monsters. Destroy this card when "Umi" leaves the field.

name: Mask of Brutality
desc: The equipped monster gains 1000 ATK and loses 1000 DEF. During each of your Standby Phases, pay 1000 LP or destroy this card.

name: The Emperor's Holiday
desc: Negate all Equip Card effects on the field.

name: Skull Lair
desc: Remove from play any number of Monster Cards in your Graveyard to destroy 1 face-up monster on the field whose Level is equal to the number of the cards you removed from play.

name: Boneheimer
desc: This monster wanders the seas, sucking dry any creatures it may encounter.

name: Maryokutai
desc: During your opponent's turn, when your opponent activates a Spell Card (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.

name: Earthbound Spirit
desc: A vengeful creature formed by the spirits of fallen warriors, it drags any who dare approach it into the deepest bowels of the earth.

name: Chosen One
desc: Select 1 Monster Card and 2 non-Monster Cards from your hand. Your opponent randomly selects 1 card among them. If it is a Monster Card, it is Special Summoned and send the remaining 2 cards to the Graveyard. If not, send all the cards to the Graveyard.

name: Spirit of the Breeze
desc: As long as this card remains in face-up Attack Position on your side of the field, increase your Life Points by 1000 points during each of your Standby Phases.

name: Headless Knight
desc: A haunted spirit of a falsely accused knight who wanders in search of truth and justice.

name: Nuvia the Wicked
desc: If this monster is Normal Summoned, destroy this card. If your opponent controls any monster, decrease the ATK of this card by 200 points for each monster on your opponents side of the field.

name: Fusion Gate
desc: While this card is on the field: The turn player can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from their Extra Deck, by banishing Fusion Materials listed on it from their hand or field.

name: The Portrait's Secret
desc: A portrait cursed by the artist, it is said to bring ill fortune to anyone who owns it.

name: Kycoo the Ghost Destroyer
desc: When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can target up to 2 monsters in their Graveyard; banish those targets. Your opponent cannot banish cards from either player's Graveyard.

name: Mask of Weakness
desc: Target 1 attacking monster; that target loses 700 ATK until the end of this turn.

name: The Rock Spirit
desc: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card can only be Special Summoned by removing from play 1 EARTH monster in your Graveyard. Increase the ATK of this monster by 300 points during your opponent's Battle Phase.

name: Spirit Elimination
desc: When monsters in the Graveyard are removed from play, remove monsters on your side of the field from play as substitutes. This card remains active until the end of the turn that it is activated. The substitutes remain removed from play.

name: Cure Mermaid
desc: As long as this card remains face-up on your side of the field, increase your Life Points by 800 points during each of your Standby Phases.

name: The Forgiving Maiden
desc: Tribute this face-up card to return to your hand 1 of your monsters destroyed as a result of battle during this turn.

name: Soul of Purity and Light
desc: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card can only be Special Summoned by removing from play 2 LIGHT monsters in your Graveyard. All monsters your opponent controls lose 300 ATK during their Battle Phase only.

name: Darklord Marie
desc: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: You gain 200 LP. This card must be in the Graveyard to activate and to resolve this effect.

name: Melchid the Four-Face Beast
desc: This monster has four different masks for four different attacks.

name: Deal of Phantom
desc: Select 1 face-up monster on the field. Increase the selected monster's ATK by 100 points for each monster in your Graveyard during the turn this card is activated. The number of monsters is applied when this card is activated.

name: Flying Fish
desc: Three wishes are granted to those fortunate enough to see this monster in flight.

name: Empress Mantis
desc: Queen of an army of giant mantises whose command moves legions.

name: Tornado Bird
desc: FLIP: Return 2 Spell or Trap Cards on the field to their owners' hands.

name: Ekibyo Drakmord
desc: The equipped monster cannot attack. Destroy the equipped monster at the end of its controller's 2nd turn after this card is activated. At that time, this card is returned to the owner's hand.

name: Gilasaurus
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If Summoned this way: Activate this effect; your opponent can Special Summon 1 monster from their GY.

name: United We Stand
desc: The equipped monster gains 800 ATK/DEF for each face-up monster you control.

name: Flame Dancer
desc: This monster moves while swinging its burning rope.

name: Dancing Fairy
desc: As long as this card remains in face-up Defense Position on your side of the field, increase your Life Points by 1000 points during each of your Standby Phases.

name: Fire Sorcerer
desc: FLIP: Randomly select 2 cards from your hand and remove them from play to inflict 800 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points.

name: Crimson Sentry
desc: Tribute this face-up card to return 1 of your monsters destroyed as a result of battle during this turn to the bottom of your Deck.

name: Lady Assailant of Flames
desc: FLIP: Banish the top 3 cards of your Deck; inflict 800 damage to your opponent.

name: Hysteric Fairy
desc: Tribute 2 monsters on your side of the field to increase your Life Points by 1000 points.

name: Return of the Doomed
desc: Discard 1 Monster Card from your hand to the Graveyard. Return 1 of your monsters destroyed and sent to your Graveyard as a result of battle during this turn to your hand at the end of this turn.

name: Miracle Dig
desc: If 5 or more of your monsters are currently removed from play, return 3 of them to the Graveyard.

name: Worm Drake
desc: Once this monster wraps itself around a victim, there is no escape.

name: Scroll of Bewitchment
desc: Select 1 Attribute. Change the Attribute of the equipped monster to the one you select.

name: Spirit Message "A"
desc: This card can only be placed on the field by the effect of "Destiny Board".

name: Lady Panther
desc: Tribute this face-up card to return 1 of your monsters destroyed as a result of battle during this turn to the top of your Deck.

name: Humanoid Worm Drake
desc: "Worm Drake" + "Humanoid Slime"

name: Riryoku Field
desc: When a Spell Card that targets exactly 1 monster on the field (and no other cards) is activated: Negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.

name: Blind Destruction
desc: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Roll a six-sided die. If the result is 1-5, destroy all monsters on the field with the same Level as the number rolled. If it is 6, destroy all Level 6 and higher monsters on the field.

name: Dark Spirit of the Silent
desc: Activate only when an opponent's monster declares an attack. Negate that attack, and select another face-up monster your opponent controls. That monster attacks instead. (If it is in face-up Defense Position, change it to Attack Position.)

name: Amphibian Beast
desc: On land or in the sea, the speed of this monster is unmatchable.

name: Infinite Cards
desc: There is no limit to the number of cards in players' hands.

name: Jar of Greed
desc: Draw 1 card.
